codeReview.summary: Fix correctly addresses the blocking issue. The logout endpoint now returns envelope format {success: True, data: {success: True}} which matches what frontend's readEnvelope<T>() expects.

summary: PASS - The fix properly aligns logout endpoint response with frontend expectations. Backend returns {"success": True, "data": {"success": True}} and frontend logout() uses readEnvelope<T>() which expects Envelope<T> with success and data fields. The blocking issue from auth-google-oauth is resolved.
